ress"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"tokenId","type":"uint256"}],"name":"cancelListing","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"feeBalance","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"nftContract","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"tokenId","type":"uint256"}],"name":"getListing","outputs":[{"components":[{"internalType":"address","name":"seller","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"price","type":"uint256"}],"internalType":"struct NFTMarketplace.Listing","name":"","type":"tuple"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"nftContract","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"tokenId","type":"uint256"}],"name":"isItemListed","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"nftContract","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"tokenId","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"price","type":"uint256"}],"name":"listItem","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"name":"listings","outputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"seller","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"price","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"owner","outputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"renounceOwnership","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"newOwner","type":"address"}],"name":"transferOwnership","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"nftContract","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"tokenId","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"newPrice","type":"uint256"}],"name":"updateListing","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"withdrawFees","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"stateMutability":"payable","type":"receive"}],"devdoc":{"author":"rainwaters11 \u2014 Day 26: NFT Marketplace","details":"NON-CUSTODIAL \u2014 THE APPROVAL PATTERN         \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510         \u2502  Traditional pawn shop:  You GIVE them the item to sell it.  \u2502         \u2502  Misty Market:           NFT STAYS IN YOUR WALLET.           \u2502         \u2502                                                              \u2502         \u2502  1. Seller calls nftContract.approve(marketplace, tokenId)   \u2502         \u2502     \u2192 Gives permission to move the NFT on their behalf.      \u2502         \u2502  2. Seller calls listItem() \u2014 metadata stored on-chain.      \u2502         \u2502  3. Buyer calls buyItem()   \u2014 one atomic transaction:        \u2502         \u2502       a. ETH sent in by buyer.                               \u2502         \u2502       b. Contract transfers NFT from seller \u2192 buyer.         \u2502         \u2502       c. ETH (minus fee) transferred to seller.              \u2502         \u2502     Either ALL of this happens or NONE of it.                \u2502         \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518         THE ATOMIC SWAP \u2014 WHY NO ESCROW IS NEEDED         \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510         \u2502  In computer science, \"atomic\" means indivisible:            \u2502         \u2502  it either completes fully or reverts entirely.              \u2502         \u2502                                                              \u2502         \u2502  If the seller moves their NFT after listing but BEFORE      \u2502         \u2502  someone buys, the safeTransferFrom inside buyItem() will    \u2502         \u2502  revert (the marketplace is no longer approved).             \u2502         \u2502  The buyer's ETH is automatically returned \u2014 no loss.        \u2502         \u2502                                                              \u2502         \u2502  The code IS the escrow.                                     \u2502         \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518         THE FEE ENGINE \u2014 BASIS POINT STANDARD         \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510         \u2502  1 BPS = 0.01 %                                              \u2502         \u2502  250 BPS = 2.50 % (MARKETPLACE_FEE_BPS)                     \u2502         \u2502                                                              \u2502         \u2502  fee      = price \u00d7 250 / 10_000                            \u2502         \u2502  sellerNet = price \u2212 fee                                     \u2502         \u2502                                                              \u2502         \u2502  Example: 1 ETH sale                                         \u2502         \u2502    fee      = 1e18 \u00d7 250 / 10_000 = 0.025 ETH               \u2502         \u2502    seller   = 0.975 ETH                                      \u2502         \u2502    platform = 0.025 ETH (accumulated in feeBalance)          \u2502         \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518         MULTI-COLLECTION SUPPORT \u2014 NESTED MAPPING         \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510         \u2502  listings[nftContract][tokenId] = Listing                    \u2502         \u2502                                                              \u2502         \u2502  This single mapping supports ALL ERC-721 collections        \u2502         \u2502  simultaneously.  No re-deployment needed for new NFTs.      \u2502         \u2502  Misty Crochet Badges, partner PFPs, game items \u2014 all        \u2502         \u2502  trade on the same marketplace with the same fee structure.  \u2502         \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518         CHECKS-EFFECTS-INTERACTIONS (C-E-I) IN buyItem         State changes happen BEFORE any external calls:           1. CHECK  \u2014 price matches, listing exists, not self-buying           2. EFFECT \u2014 delete listing, update feeBalance       \u2190 FIRST           3. INTERACT \u2014 transferFrom NFT, transfer ETH to seller \u2190 LAST         This ordering prevents reentrancy attacks without needing an         extra modifier on buyItem, though ReentrancyGuard is still used         as a belt-and-suspenders measure.         USE CASES IN MISTYCOIN-CORE         \u2022 Community trades MistyCoin NFTs (Day 26) peer-to-peer.         \u2022 Protocol earns revenue from fees \u2192 MultiSig treasury (Day 24).         \u2022 Pricefeed integration possible for ETH\u2192USD display on frontend.","errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"buyItem(address,uint256)":{"details":"STRICT CHECKS-EFFECTS-INTERACTIONS ORDER \u2014 THE KEY SAFETY RULE         \u2705 CHECKS  (validate all pre-conditions)           \u2022 listing exists (isListed modifier)           \u2022 buyer is not the seller           \u2022 msg.value >= price         \u2705 EFFECTS  (update ALL state before any external calls)           \u2022 delete listings[nftContract][tokenId]  \u2190 CRITICAL FIRST             Deleting the listing BEFORE the transfer prevents a             malicious seller/NFT contract from re-entering buyItem             and selling the same NFT twice.           \u2022 feeBalance += fee         \u2705 INTERACTIONS  (external calls last)           \u2022 safeTransferFrom(seller \u2192 buyer)  \u2190 ERC-721 transfer           \u2022 seller.call{value: sellerNet}()   \u2190 ETH payment to seller         OVERPAYMENT: If the buyer sends more ETH than the price,         the excess is NOT refunded here (keep it simple).  UI should         send exact amounts.  A production system would refund excess.","params":{"nftContract":"ERC-721 contract address.","tokenId":"Token ID to purchase."}},"calculateFee(uint256)":{"params":{"price":"Sale price in wei."},"returns":{"fee":"        Marketplace fee (2.5 %).","sellerNet":"  Amount the seller would receive."}},"cancelListing(address,uint256)":{"params":{"nftContract":"ERC-721 contract address.","tokenId":"ID of the listed NFT."}},"constructor":{"params":{"_owner":"Initial owner \u2014 receives marketplace fees. If the seller unapproves later, the listing becomes stale and         buyItem() will revert \u2014 protecting the buyer automatically.         The NFT is NOT transferred here.  It stays in the seller's wallet         until the moment a buyer calls buyItem().","params":{"nftContract":"ERC-721 contract address.","price":"Asking price in wei. Only the original seller can cancel."},"feeBalance()":{"notice":"Accumulated marketplace fees ready to be withdrawn by owner."},"getListing(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Returns an active listing, or a zero-price Listing if not found."},"isItemListed(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Check whether a specific NFT is currently listed."},"listItem(address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"List an ERC-721 NFT for sale at a fixed ETH price."},"updateListing(address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Change the asking price of an existing listing."},"withdrawFees()":{"notice":"Withdraw accumulated marketplace fees to the owner address."}},"notice":"A non-custodial, multi-collection NFT marketplace. 608b9dec3e99","dweb:/ipfs/QmTBExeX2SDTkn5xbk5ssbYSx7VqRp9H4Ux1CY4uQM4b9N"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/StorageSlot.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcf74f855663ce2ae00ed8352666b7935f6cddea2932fdf2c3ecd30a9b1cd0e97","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9f660b1f351b757dfe01438e59888f31f33ded3afcf5cb5b0d9bf9aa6f320a8b","dweb:/ipfs/QmarDJ5hZEgBtCmmrVzEZWjub9769eD686jmzb2XpSU1cM"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/introspection/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8891738ffe910f0cf2da09566928589bf5d63f4524dd734fd9cedbac3274dd5c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://971f954442df5c2ef5b5ebf1eb245d7105d9fbacc7386ee5c796df1d45b21617","dweb:/ipfs/QmadRjHbkicwqwwh61raUEapaVEtaLMcYbQZWs9gUkgj3u"]}},"version":1}

buyItem(address,uint256).details: STRICT CHECKS-EFFECTS-INTERACTIONS ORDER — THE KEY SAFETY RULE         ✅ CHECKS  (validate all pre-conditions)           • listing exists (isListed modifier)           • buyer is not the seller           • msg.value >= price         ✅ EFFECTS  (update ALL state before any external calls)           • delete listings[nftContract][tokenId]  ← CRITICAL FIRST             Deleting the listing BEFORE the transfer prevents a             malicious seller/NFT contract from re-entering buyItem             and selling the same NFT twice.           • feeBalance += fee         ✅ INTERACTIONS  (external calls last)           • safeTransferFrom(seller → buyer)  ← ERC-721 transfer           • seller.call{value: sellerNet}()   ← ETH payment to seller         OVERPAYMENT: If the buyer sends more ETH than the price,         the excess is NOT refunded here (keep it simple).  UI should         send exact amounts.  A production system would refund excess.

params._owner: Initial owner — receives marketplace fees.                In production this should be the Day 24 MultiSig.

returns._0: The Listing struct (seller + price). Price == 0 if not listed.

listItem(address,uint256,uint256).details: THE APPROVAL HANDSHAKE (caller must do this first):           nftContract.approve(address(this), tokenId)           OR           nftContract.setApprovalForAll(address(this), true)         We verify the approval on-chain before accepting the listing.         If the seller unapproves later, the listing becomes stale and         buyItem() will revert — protecting the buyer automatically.         The NFT is NOT transferred here.  It stays in the seller's wallet         until the moment a buyer calls buyItem().

params.price: Asking price in wei.  Must be > 0.
params.tokenId: ID of the NFT to sell.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.newPrice: New asking price in wei.  Must be > 0.

withdrawFees().details: In production, point `owner` to the Day 24 MultiSig wallet         so fee withdrawals also require M-of-N confirmation.

MARKETPLACE_FEE_BPS().notice: Marketplace fee = 2.5 % = 250 BPS.         Applied on every successful sale.         Fee = price × 250 / 10_000

buyItem(address,uint256).notice: Purchase a listed NFT.  Send exact ETH as msg.value.

calculateFee(uint256).notice: Calculate the fee and seller net for a given sale price.         Useful for UI preview before the buyer calls buyItem().

cancelListing(address,uint256).notice: Cancel your listing and remove it from the marketplace.         Only the original seller can cancel.

feeBalance().notice: Accumulated marketplace fees ready to be withdrawn by owner.

getListing(address,uint256).notice: Returns an active listing, or a zero-price Listing if not found.

isItemListed(address,uint256).notice: Check whether a specific NFT is currently listed.

listItem(address,uint256,uint256).notice: List an ERC-721 NFT for sale at a fixed ETH price.

updateListing(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Change the asking price of an existing listing.

withdrawFees().notice: Withdraw accumulated marketplace fees to the owner address.
